findings.description: Title slide layout collapsed from styled cover page to plain text layout
findings.evidence: PDF shows a dark blue branded cover slide with large title, subtitle, author, and date with Novo Nordisk bull logo. HTML shows plain text rendering without the branded layout structure.

findings.description: Cover slide bull logo/graphic missing in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF has a large decorative bull illustration on the right side of the cover. HTML omits this decorative graphic.

findings.description: Novo Nordisk at a glance page loses its multi-column grid layout with colored tiles
findings.evidence: PDF shows a structured grid of colored tiles with key statistics (50%, 290.4 billion DKK, 80 countries, 52 billion DKK in R&D, 45.2 million people) alongside therapy area images. HTML renders this as a flat sequential list of text items.

findings.description: Therapy area images (Cardiovascular, Rare Disease, Diabetes, Obesity) displayed differently
findings.evidence: PDF shows four distinct therapy area photos in a grid layout. HTML shows them merged into what appears to be a composite image, losing individual context.

findings.description: Global presence page loses its map-centric layout with information sidebar
findings.evidence: PDF shows a large world map with color-coded regions on the right, corporate info on the left, and a pink '80 countries' callout. HTML renders as a dark-background map image followed by a flat text list.

findings.description: Product Supply in NC & Virginia loses its grid-based infographic layout
findings.evidence: PDF shows a complex grid of tiles with statistics ($10B, 31 years, 60+ countries), award logos, LEED certification, and images. HTML renders as sequential text with a single composite image.

findings.description: Novo Nordisk in North Carolina page loses its two-column layout (images left, text right)
findings.evidence: PDF has three aerial facility photos stacked on the left with bullet points and facility stats on the right. HTML shows images stacked on top followed by bullet points below.

findings.description: Four must-win battles page loses its quadrant layout with central globe graphic
findings.evidence: PDF shows a centered globe illustration with four numbered battles (#1-#4) positioned around it. HTML renders as a flat numbered list.

findings.description: CO2 emissions targets page loses its side-by-side layout with targets panel
findings.evidence: PDF shows city illustration on left and three targets with circular images on right panel. HTML renders targets sequentially with small images.

findings.description: Circular for Zero page loses its three-column layout (supply, company, products)
findings.evidence: PDF shows three circular images with labels arranged horizontally. HTML renders them sequentially as separate sections.

findings.description: Reading order preserved but visual grouping lost on Circular for Zero Energy and Water Goals page
findings.evidence: PDF groups Mapping and Project savings content clearly. HTML maintains the same text order but loses visual hierarchy emphasis.

findings.description: Mapping Strategy hierarchical diagram rendered as flat text
findings.evidence: PDF shows a structured organizational diagram with Site Usage → Building Usage → Process/Other Usage → M/U hierarchy with External/Internal data arrows. HTML renders as flat text listing.

findings.description: Mapping Strategy hierarchical structure rendered as plain text instead of diagram/table
findings.evidence: PDF shows a visual hierarchy diagram with boxes for Site Usage, Building Usage, Process Usage, Other Usage, M (Measured) and U (Unmeasured). HTML renders as: 'Building Usage | Building Usage | Building Usage' and 'M U | M U | M U' as plain text.

findings.description: Goal - Mapping page loses its two-column layout (bullet points left, pie chart right)
findings.evidence: PDF shows bullet point content on the left and a baseline electricity consumption pie chart on the right. HTML renders bullet points followed by a small pie chart below, then a text listing of percentages.

findings.description: Natural Gas and Steam Example process flow diagram is very small and potentially illegible in HTML
findings.evidence: PDF shows a large detailed process flow diagram spanning the full page. HTML shows the same diagram as a smaller embedded image.

findings.description: Water Example Process Flows page loses its two-panel layout (drivers left, Sankey diagram right)
findings.evidence: PDF shows driver bullet points on the left and a detailed water flow/Sankey diagram on the right. HTML renders drivers as text followed by the diagram below, plus extensive text data extracted from the diagram.

findings.description: Water flow diagram data extracted as extensive plain text listing
findings.evidence: PDF presents water flow data visually in a Sankey/flow diagram. HTML extracts all numerical values as a long sequential text list (City Water 1846.2, Total industrial water 1727.6, etc.), which changes the information presentation significantly.

findings.description: Water Mapping Visualization page loses its side-by-side heat map and bar chart layout
findings.evidence: PDF shows a treemap/heat map on the left and a stacked bar chart on the right. HTML renders them sequentially stacked vertically.

findings.description: Mapping through collaboration page layout slightly differs but content preserved
findings.evidence: PDF has text on left with photo and decorative icons on right. HTML renders sequentially but preserves all content.

findings.description: Goal - Project Savings page content preserved but visual chart icon repositioned
findings.evidence: PDF shows chart icon in bottom right corner. HTML renders content sequentially without the decorative icon emphasis.

findings.description: Energy Savings Project Examples page loses its two-column layout (Inactivation Skid left, Distillation right)
findings.evidence: PDF shows two project examples side by side in columns. HTML renders them sequentially one after the other.

findings.description: Water Savings Project Examples page loses its two-column layout (Filter backwash left, Conductivity right)
findings.evidence: PDF shows two water savings examples side by side. HTML renders them sequentially.

findings.description: Questions/closing slide loses decorative illustration layout but contact info preserved
findings.evidence: PDF shows artistic line illustrations with centered Questions text and contact info. HTML renders as plain text with contact information.

findings.description: Questions page decorative healthcare illustrations missing
findings.evidence: PDF has elaborate connected line art illustrations (globe, people, medical devices). HTML omits these decorative elements.

findings.description: Multiple h1 tags used throughout the HTML document. Each page's title is rendered as h1, resulting in approximately 15+ h1 headings instead of one.
findings.evidence: HTML contains h1 for: 'Energy and Water at Novo Nordisk', 'Novo Nordisk at a glance', 'Our global presence', 'Novo Nordisk Product Supply in North Carolina & Virginia', 'Novo Nordisk in North Carolina', 'We are focusing on four must-win battles', 'Must-win challenge to reduce CO2 emissions', 'Driving change as an environmentally responsible business', 'Circular for Zero – Energy and Water Goals', 'Mapping Strategy – Energy and Water', 'Goal - Mapping', 'Natural Gas and Steam Example', 'Water Example – Process Flows', 'Water Mapping – Visualization', 'Mapping through collaboration', 'Goal – Project Savings', 'Energy Savings Project Examples', 'Water Savings Project Examples', 'Questions?'. Only one h1 is acceptable.

findings.description: The source URL link is fragmented into multiple separate anchor tags in the HTML, though the destination URL content is preserved.
findings.evidence: PDF has single link: 'https://companiesmarketcap.com/pharmaceuticals/largest-pharmaceutical-companies-by-market-cap/'. HTML splits it into 6 separate <a> tags: '-pharmaceutical', '-companies', '-by', '-market', '-cap/' etc.

findings.description: The number '170' appearing in the PDF as the number of countries (context: affiliates in 170 countries) is presented in the HTML as '170 countries' as a standalone line, but the PDF slide 2 shows '170' once at top without clear context and '80' as affiliates in countries. The HTML preserves both but the '170' line is somewhat ambiguous.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 2 shows '170' at top and 'Affiliates in 80 countries'. HTML has '

170 countries

' and '

Affiliates in 80 countries

'. The '170' in the PDF appears to be a standalone stat without clear label on the slide.

findings.description: Water process flow data on page 13 is converted to flat text paragraphs, losing the spatial/flow relationship of the Sankey-style diagram. While individual numbers are preserved, the hierarchical flow structure is not represented.
findings.evidence: PDF page 13 shows a complex Sankey/flow diagram with arrows and connections between process steps. HTML renders this as a flat list of values like 'City Water 1846.2', 'GN Utility: Softened water produtciton 731.0' etc. without structural relationships.

findings.description: Typo from source PDF 'produtciton' is faithfully preserved in HTML, which is correct behavior.
findings.evidence: Both PDF and HTML contain 'Softened water produtciton'

findings.description: Page 10 mapping strategy content includes text like 'Site Usage', 'Building Usage', 'Process Usage', 'Other Usage', 'M U' which represents a diagram structure. This is not truly duplicated content but the repetition of building/process/other usage three times reflects the three-column diagram structure from the PDF.
findings.evidence: HTML: 'Building Usage | Building Usage | Building Usage' and 'Process Usage | Other Usage | Process Usage | Other Usage | Process Usage | Other Usage' and 'M U | M U | M U | M U | M U | M U'
